courses.name: Machine Learning for Data Science (DS2401)
clos: 1.1 Identify appropriate analysis tools and techniques.
1.2 Discuss the role of machine learning methods for solving real-world problems.
1.3 Explain and differentiate between at least three key methods and algorithms used in data science, highlighting their applications, strengths, and weaknesses.
2.1 Apply appropriate machine learning techniques to support problem solving and decision making.
2.2 Apply machine learning techniques to conduct research for real-world data science problems.
3.1 Evaluate and justify ethical decisio nmaking in data collection, storage, processing, and sharing, ensuring compliance with relevant regulations.
